nb_binning_policy: Nb plots merge b >= 3 into a single >=3 bin.
template_binning_policy: For cat2/cat3/cat7 MET and cat4/cat5/cat6 recoil templates, all bins with lower edge >= 800 GeV are merged into [800, inf].

metUnclustered.source: metUnclustered shifted payloads adjusted to zinv-tail-corrected nominal

uncertainty_policy: DATA uncertainties are statistical. Background uncertainty is recomputed as sqrt(MC stat^2 + lumi^2 + sum individual shape-envelope^2) after the Zinv tail correction; stale aggregate metUnclustered envelopes are retained only in *_old_stale fields.

uncertainty_recompute.reason: The Zinv tail correction changed nominal and metUnclustered deltas; aggregate background_syst_unc had to be recomputed from the corrected individual variations.

zinv_tail_fix.policy: Existing full preview missed nominal old-MC tail shards 01967-02109 containing Zto2Nu. This summary adds readable tail Zto2Nu nominal histograms and adjusts metUnclustered deltas to the corrected nominal.
